title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S21
body:
**Scene 21: 26:30–27:30 · They Leave the Apartment**

HERO FRAME: Wide of the apartment building hallway, evening · the door to 4-A closing behind Walter and the Visitor · the hallway brightly lit with warm light · Grace's door (4-B) also open, with warm light spilling out (implication: she is on the other side too) · the building feels FULL of warmth for the first time

MOTION: kling — the door to 4-A closes softly. The hallway light brightens. Other doors along the hallway are also slightly open, light spilling from each. The house plant in the hall pot seems to straighten its leaves.

MOOD: The empty world has been quietly full the whole time.

AUDIO: Visitor: *"Come. There is a place prepared."*

A small click as the apartment door closes.

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
